creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
jpaetzel    2010-07-05 19:42:31 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    databases/tora       Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Update databases/tora to 2.1.2
  Add OPTIONS for SQL backends
  Disable Oracle support by default (so tora can be compiled for amd64 with other SQL backends)
  
  PR:     ports/148328
  Submitted by:   Cezary Morga <cm@therek.net>
  Approved by:    itetcu@ (mentor) implicit
  Feature safe: yes
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.34      +16 -17    ports/databases/tora/Makefile
  1.13      +3 -3      ports/databases/tora/distinfo
  1.4       +10 -3     ports/databases/tora/pkg-descr
  1.7       +10 -7     ports/databases/tora/pkg-plist
